title: Inference pipeline
brief: Explain how a prompt becomes tokens, vectors, transformer activations, and a next-token prediction. Use one hero flow with 3-4 labeled stages.

title: Architecture flow
brief: Show how a user request moves through app, orchestration, model, tools, and response. Prefer a simple left-to-right architecture flow.

title: Before and after
brief: Compare an unpolished manual workflow with a cleaner AI-assisted workflow. Use two large contrasting regions and one clear takeaway.

title: Timeline progression
brief: Show a progression from idea to prototype to production. Use a clean timeline with 3 milestones and restrained labels.

title: Concept metaphor
brief: Explain a complex technical idea with one strong visual metaphor, minimal labels, and a clear title/subtitle hierarchy.
